## 🏛️ Layer Information

- Layer Number: [e.g. L0, L3, L10]
- Layer Name: [e.g. Constitution, Reasoning, Sandbox]
- Ancient Wisdom Reference: [e.g. 秦始皇/御书房]

## 🎯 Enhancement Description

A clear and concise description of the enhancement.

## 📋 Current Behavior

Describe how the layer currently works.

## ✨ Proposed Behavior

Describe how you envision the layer working after enhancement.

## 🔧 Implementation Details

Outline the technical implementation approach:

```python
# Pseudocode or code snippet
```

## 🧪 Testing Strategy

How should this be tested?

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Performance benchmarks

## 📚 Documentation Updates

What documentation needs to be updated?

- [ ] API reference
- [ ] Architecture diagrams
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] README

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues or PRs.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the layer enhancement here.
